---
name: "✨ Component Request"
about: Request a new component or enhancement to an existing one
title: "[COMPONENT] <component-name>"
labels: enhancement, component-request
assignees: ''
---

## Component Name

What should the component be called? (e.g., Rating, Timeline, Chip)

## Is this a new component or an enhancement to an existing one?

- [ ] New component
- [ ] Enhancement to existing component

## Existing component name (if enhancement)

<!-- Which component would you like to improve? -->

## Description

A clear description of the component you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Why do you need this component? What problem does it solve?

## Expected Props / API

```jsx
<YourComponent
  variant="default"
  size="md"
  // ... other props
/>
```

## Visual Reference

Link to similar components in other UI libraries, screenshots, Figma designs, etc.

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I'd like to implement this component myself
- [ ] I'm requesting someone else implement it

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or references.
